-0.0943*exp(0.0461*sin(3.0455*x_2 + 0.5497) - 0.1743*sin(1.4357*x_3 + 0.9933) - 0.2997*sin(1.4204*x_4 - 1.8003) + 0.1011*tanh(5.1451*x_1 - 7.3971)) + 0.0116*sin(0.4834*x_1 - 0.4044*(0.5852 - x_3)**2 - 0.7669*sin(1.6249*x_4 - 8.2151) + 0.8856*sinh(0.7993 - 1.34*x_2) + 6.329) + 0.0209*sin(-2.1084*x_3 + 0.0984*exp(1.8007*x_1) + 3.3468*sin(1.1207*x_2 + 4.5488) + 0.0945*sin(3.5905*x_4 + 1.8186) - 3.8148) - 0.4879*sin(0.1095*(0.8338 - x_2)**2 + 0.0016*exp(2.678*x_1) + 0.0394*sin(3.2221*x_4 - 5.4354) + 0.2738*tanh(2.3535*x_3 - 3.2509) + 3.4636) - 0.0795
